sections.content: World model revised: RIGHT from state 9 stays at state 9 (blocked), despite state graph showing RIGHT→0. Need alternative path to state 0. Try UP to state 8, then DOWN to state 0.

sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# From state 9, try UP to state 8, then DOWN to state 0
result = action(['UP', 'DOWN'])
print(f"After UP,DOWN: state={state_graph.current}")
seg = current_frame.segmentation
for n in seg['nodes']:
    if n['color'] == 'b':
        print(f"Blue: boundary={n['boundary'][:4]}")
        break

# Check if at state 0
if state_graph.current == 0:
    print("At state 0!")
    result = action([{'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': 55, 'col': 21}])
    print(f"After MOUSE: state={state_graph.current}, level_completed={last_action_result.get('level_completed')}")
else:
    print(f"Not at state 0, current state={state_graph.current}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
